featured_reviews.name: Jes MIMI
featured_reviews.review_text:
The Koi cafe concept has actually been around for a long time, but it has recently gone viral on Instagram. The place is lively and crowded, with many foreigners lining up to get in.

The cafe provides clear notes online and on-site, though larger and more visible signs would be helpful.

As with many visually stunning cafes, food and drinks are only average , not bad, but nothing particularly impressive. Menu too much ,  The staff were quite busy, likely due to the holiday season and limited manpower.

The biggest highlight is the beautiful design with lots of greenery and a rare natural atmosphere in the middle of the city, which makes people willing to wait just to sit inside the koi pond area on the first floor -- the most attractive spot.

==> Overall: great for the experience and ambience, but if you're expecting outstanding food and drinks, you might want to reconsider.

^^ Quan ca phe co ca Koi thi k co xa la gi nhung thay gan day vieo Quan nay chay len lien tuc, rat noi tren Instagram, nen ghe thu. Khong khi dong vui, nhieu khach nuoc ngoai xep hang. Khong gian va thiet ke la diem manh lon nhat, dac biet khu ngoi trong ho ca o tang 1 khien khach san sang cho doi. Nhung minh thi k co nhu cau ngoi o duoi do cho lam nen tranh thu ngoi tren lau cho roi . Tren lau nhin xuong cung kha la chill. Toilet sach dep thom phuc. 

Tuy nhien, bang huong dan nen lam to va de nhin hon de tranh khach boi roi luc vao quan. Va nho ghi chu them la khu vuc F1 luon trong tinh trang Full , va nhan booking sap xep lai, chu cho moi ban an 2 tieng toi het suc.

Do an, thuc uong hien o muc trung binh; menu kha nhieu mon nhung chua co mon that su noi bat. Viec tinh gon menu, tap trung vao mot vai mon "signature" se giup bep nhe hon va chat luong on dinh hon. Neu khong, quan rat de tro thanh noi khach chi ghe mot lan de check-in, kho tao ly do quay lai.

Nhan vien kha tat bat, nhung toc do hoi cham chac do dia hinh quan.

--> Quan co khong gian rat tot; neu cai thien menu it nhung chat luong mon va van hanh smoothly hon kha nang giu chan khach quay lai se cao hon nhieu va mo rong them 3-4-5 chi nhanh nua do .

featured_reviews.name: Vuong Alex
featured_reviews.review_text:
He thong Oasis cafe kha lau doi, kieu mo hinh giong nhau, dieu lam nen su song dong va gan gui thien nhien la ho ca Koi trong quan.

LUU U TRANH TRAI NGHIEM KHONG VUI

Cac ban trong khu vuc ho ca Koi ban khong duoc tu do chon va ngoi. KHI DEN QUAN CAN PHAI DANG KU LE TAN DE LAY SO THU TU LAY BAN. Viec nay se dan den nhieu trai nghiem kho chiu, cac ban xem cac review 1 sao se thay dieu nay. Ban than minh cung co trai nghiem viec nay nhung danh gia tong quan chung minh van cho 4 sao vi moi thu deu kha tot.

Quan co dan 1 to giay kha nho ve viec dang ky ban ca Koi nhung rat nho, va minh dam bao ban toi thi ko ai de y dau! Viec nay quan da bao thay doi va khac phuc nhung minh thay van rat nhieu nguoi khong bik. Vi vay DE CO BAN NGOI THEO U MUON BAN PHAI DANG KU BAN VOI LE TAN. Chu ban toi ban thay co ban trong trong khu ho ca Koi ban ngoi, ban khong dang ky thi quan ho se moi ban dung day.

Ve nuoc uong thi trinh bay dep, chat luong nuoc ok, cafe sua da muc 7/10. Khoai tay chien thi nhieu dau va khoai cat rat nho, khoai tay 5/10.

Nhan vien phuc vu nhanh nhen tuy nhien khong biet co ap luc gi tu chinh sach quan khong, nhin kha met moi va khong nang dong.

Quan co nhieu cay xanh, va trong mai che khep kin, may lanh va may quat phun suong hoat dong lien tuc nen khong khi rat mat me.

featured_reviews.name: My Thao
featured_reviews.review_text:
Xin phep danh gia 2 sao cho Service va chat luong do an o quan.
Du minh biet den mo hinh quan kha lau nhung day la lan dau trai nghiem cua minh va gia dinh.
* Service : minh k duoc huong dan ve viec ngoi ban phai duoc tiep tan huong dan book so. Khi gia dinh minh toi truoc nhung co anh chi khac chay voi vao gianh ban thi ban tiep tan cung khong noi gi khach kia. Cho den khi phuc vu cho biet ve van de nay thi minh moi hoi ban le tan lai thi moi co dc ban ngoi voi vi tri mong muon.
* minh ngoi gan 15ph phuc vu van chua don ban va hoi oder. Phuc vu dem thieu 1 ly nuoc - minh nhac va dc bao "doi". Sau minh cha buon noi nua. Thi 1 tieng sau ly nuoc cua minh moi duoc mang len. Minh noi " c chuan bi ve roi em ", thi nhan vien mac ke va quay di khong noi gi .
* phan nem chua ran dc them chen trai cay. Nhung trai cay nhu bi ngam nuoc da - bo va mem nhun nuoc , nhat luon .
Noi chung la mot trai nghiem kha te cho lan dau den cua minh. Neu noi quay lai thi chac se khong dau.

featured_reviews.name: Wally D
featured_reviews.review_text:
We stumbled across Lagom Cafe in District 3 on our last night in Ho Chi Minh , and it turned into the perfect farewell to Vietnam  .

The 46-page beer menu immediately caught our eye, full of detailed descriptions that made exploring Belgian beers a fun adventure. But what really made it special was the staff -- knowledgeable, attentive, and genuinely passionate. Their suggestions, including La Divine and a Corsendonk, were spot on!!

Lagom isn't just about beer. The full food menu, creative cocktails, and healthy drinks make it a place where both of us felt completely taken care of. We settled into a cozy private nook, soaked in the unique interior and great music, and everything felt very lagom -- balanced and just right.

A beautiful last night memory

featured_reviews.name: Tran Tran
featured_reviews.review_text:
"Lagom" means "just right" in Swedish, one of the servers told me that, and it's pretty much how this place felt to me. Cozy, warm lighting, a little European corner where Belgian beer actually gets a chance to shine instead of just...get you drunk.

The food was nice, though my hokubee beef in red wine sauce was a bit too done for my taste - would be better if they asked how I like my steak. Staff were friendly and helpful, and it'd be even cooler if they shared more little stories behind each beer.

Overall, a really solid spot to sit down, sip slowly, talk a little, learn a little. I wouldn't mind coming back for another "just right" night here

featured_reviews.name: Nhu Pham
featured_reviews.review_text:
Came here once a while ago, and I still think about this place. Absolutely love the coconut beer, the sausage, and the deep fried mushrooms. Forgot to ask for the staff's name, but she was very sweet. She helped us move to another floor because a family with babies was quite loud lol. Really appreciated it, since my boyfriend and I just wanted to relax after a long, tough day at work 
We will for sure come back!

featured_reviews.review_text:
My business partner Marc Nguyen bought me here and what a fabuleus place. It is a little bit of Belgium in the heart of Ho Chi Minh City.
All the proper beers you can think of and all served with a smile. To be honest l believe that Marc is an excellent ambassador of Belgium. In short you haven't seen this city if you didn't visit LaGom.

featured_reviews.name: Sander Salen
featured_reviews.review_text:
As Belgian tourists, we had to visit this place.

It's a nice pub in the centre of Ho Chi Minh City. The interior is really beautiful. You can see they put a lot of effort in it.

The staff is very friendly and welcoming.

The choice of beer is astonishing. And, when you order one, you get a card with information about it. Their vision to bring Belgium to Vietnam is working really well.  You see that by the way they pour out the beer in the glass.

Worth a visit if you are around. It's imported beer, so you pay them as such.

AND, as Belgian tourists you get a discount on the bill!!

featured_reviews.name: The Duy
featured_reviews.review_text: This is a great spot to relax with friends. The beer is excellent, the food is delicious, and the space feels cozy and welcoming. Everything is neatly arranged, creating a warm and comfortable atmosphere. Highly recommend!

detailed_reviews.name: Trinh Nguyen Thi Hanh
detailed_reviews.review_text:
Minh that su da co mot buoi toi khong the quen tai Lagom Vo Thi Sau, Quan 3.

Sau thang truoc, khong hieu bang cach nao ma minh lam roi mot chiec charm hinh hoa anh dao - mon do minh khong the thieu khi mang tui xach di choi va rat yeu quy no. Minh khong biet minh da roi o dau, roi khi nao, va tham chi tung nghi se chang bao gio tim lai duoc nua 

Toi nay, khi hen ban den Lagom uong bia, minh chi hoi vu vo ban nhan vien rang: "Quan co tung giu lai mot chiec charm khach danh roi khong?" Ban nhe nhang dap: "Neu khach lam roi, ben em deu giu lai a."
Roi lo 8 chuyen voi ban, cau chuyen cuon minh di, minh gan nhu quen mat minh da hoi dieu do.

Cho den khi chuan bi ra ve... ban nhan vien buoc den, cam tren tay mot chiec charm va hoi:
"Co phai chi dang tim cai nay khong a?"

Khoanh khac ay, minh thuc su sung so. Nhin thay chiec charm sau 6 thang that lac, minh khong tin noi do la su that. Cam giac nhu mot giac mo, vua bat ngo, vua hanh phuc kinh khung khieppp luonnnn 

Dieu khien minh tran trong khong chi la viec tim lai mot mon do nho be. Ma la cach Lagom gin giu gia tri cua ho:
* Su trung thuc duoc dao tao va thuc hanh ro rang trong tung nhan vien.
* Su ton trong khach hang, ke ca voi nhung dieu nho nhat.
* Mot he gia tri kinh doanh dat chu "uy tin" len tren loi ich tuc thoi.

Trong thoi dai ma nhieu thu de dang bi bo qua, viec mot quan luu giu can than mon do nho suot nua nam da noi len dang cap that su. Dang cap khong nam o khong gian dep hay bia ngon (du Lagom co ca hai), ma nam o van hoa noi bo va nhan cach kinh doanh.

Toi danh gia Lagom khong chi la mot quan bia Bi nhap khau noi tieng, ma la mot noi kinh doanh co tam va co tam.

Va toi nay, toi roi quan voi hai dieu trong tay:
Mot chiec charm hoa anh dao... va mot niem tin dep vao nhung gia tri tu te van dang duoc gin giu moi ngay.

detailed_reviews.name: Paul
detailed_reviews.review_text:
Mot chiec quan specialty dung kieu "hidden gem": nho, kin, hoi kho tim mot chut -- nhung da buoc vao roi la thay dang.

Khong gian toi gian va yen, vibe nghieng ve nguoi that su uong ca phe hon la chup hinh. Menu khong dai, nhung "chat": quan co rat nhieu hat xin tu khap noi tren the gioi, kieu ban co the di mot vong tu Ethiopia (floral/tea-like) sang Kenya (chua mong, blackcurrant) roi qua Colombia (can bang, caramel) chi trong vai lan ghe.

Diem minh thich nhat la cach quan tu van hat: hoi gu uong (thich chua/dang, thom hoa hay vi chocolate, uong nong hay da) roi goi y rat dung. Minh thu pour-over, ly len huong ro rang, sach vi, hau ngot dai; cam giac moi hat deu duoc "lam tu te", khong bi kieu rang qua tay hay pha cho nhanh.

Neu ban dang chan ca phe "na na nhau" va muon mot noi uong de hieu hat, kham pha tung profile theo mua, thi day la diem nen luu.
Tip: noi thang gu cua ban (it chua / nhieu huong / body day...) va hoi "hat nao dang peak hom nay" -- trai nghiem se da hon han.

featured_reviews.name: Slim Shady
featured_reviews.review_text:
I have two main allergies:
All dairy products
And
Monosodium glutamate (bot ngot hoac mi chinh)

This restaurant went out of their way to make me a special pho without the regular broth.

I ate both the prawn salad rolls (delicious) and beef pho with lots of vegetables, chillies,  hot sauce, etc. Coriander and bean sprouts were fresh, green, and crunchy.

It turned out quite deliciously.
I want to thank the exemplary man that assisted me today for his patience, thoughtfulness, resourcefulness in finding something I could eat.

Tasty place. Excellent staff with great communication. Prices on par with other airport meals.

featured_reviews.name: Jenny Nguyen
featured_reviews.review_text: +84 Cafe tai Sanh ga den Quoc Noi cua San bay Tan Son Nhat la mot lua chon tuyet voi de hanh khach co the thu gian va nap nang luong sau chuyen bay. Quan co khong gian thoang dang, sach se va duoc bo tri tien loi, giup ban de dang tim mot cho ngoi thoai mai. Cac loai do uong o day duoc pha che nhanh chong, dam bao chat luong va huong vi thom ngon, tu ca phe truyen thong den cac loai do uong giai khat khac. Dich vu tai +84 Cafe rat chuyen nghiep, than thien va hieu qua, rat phu hop voi nhip do hoi ha cua san bay. Day la diem den ly tuong de ban co the nghi ngoi choc lat hoac cho don nguoi than. De lam cho thoi gian cho doi them phan thu vi, +84 Cafe co the su dung Tuneast de tao ra mot khong gian am nhac da dang, cho phep khach hang binh chon bai hat yeu thich va gui loi nhan, tao su tuong tac va thu gian.
featured_reviews.review_translated_text: +84 Cafe in the Domestic Arrivals Hall of Tan Son Nhat Airport is a great option for passengers to relax and recharge after their flight. The cafe boasts a spacious, clean, and conveniently arranged space, making it easy to find a comfortable seat. Drinks are prepared quickly, ensuring quality and delicious flavor, from traditional coffee to other refreshing beverages. The service at +84 Cafe is professional, friendly, and efficient, perfectly suited to the fast-paced airport environment. It's an ideal spot to take a short break or wait for loved ones. To make waiting time more enjoyable, +84 Cafe can utilize Tuneast to create a diverse musical atmosphere, allowing customers to vote for their favorite songs and leave messages, fostering interaction and relaxation.

The drink menu is diverse, ranging from rich, traditional coffee to refreshing iced teas and unique dried tea combos, all of high quality. The staff here are very friendly and enthusiastic, always ensuring customer satisfaction. Saigon Pho Coffee is definitely an ideal choice for enjoying relaxing moments.
